'''鈭歝h-sh-dh''' ('''chashadha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yab|yab]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-sh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yab|yab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-sh-dh
|-
! Lemma
| chashadha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chashadhithi|chashadhithi]] || [[word:chashadhiji|chashadhiji]] || [[word:chashadhishi|chashadhishi]] || [[word:chashadhi|chashadhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chashadhuthuth|chashadhuthuth]] || [[word:chashadhujuj|chashadhujuj]] || [[word:chashadhushush|chashadhushush]] || [[word:chashadh|chashadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chashadhuthu|chashadhuthu]] || [[word:chashadhuju|chashadhuju]] || [[word:chashadhushu|chashadhushu]] || [[word:chashadhu|chashadhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chashadhufuth|chashadhufuth]] || [[word:chashadhufuj|chashadhufuj]] || [[word:chashadhufush|chashadhufush]] || [[word:chashadhuf|chashadhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chashadhethe|chashadhethe]] || [[word:chashadheje|chashadheje]] || [[word:chashadheshe|chashadheshe]] || [[word:chashadhe|chashadhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chashadhothoth|chashadhothoth]] || [[word:chashadhojoj|chashadhojoj]] || [[word:chashadhoshosh|chashadhoshosh]] || [[word:chashadh|chashadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chashadhotho|chashadhotho]] || [[word:chashadhojo|chashadhojo]] || [[word:chashadhosho|chashadhosho]] || [[word:chashadho|chashadho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chashadhofoth|chashadhofoth]] || [[word:chashadhofoj|chashadhofoj]] || [[word:chashadhofosh|chashadhofosh]] || [[word:chashadhof|chashadhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chashadh忙th忙|chashadh忙th忙]] || [[word:chashadh忙j忙|chashadh忙j忙]] || [[word:chashadh忙sh忙|chashadh忙sh忙]] || [[word:chashadh忙|chashadh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chashadhathath|chashadhathath]] || [[word:chashadhajaj|chashadhajaj]] || [[word:chashadhashash|chashadhashash]] || [[word:chashadh|chashadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chashadhatha|chashadhatha]] || [[word:chashadhaja|chashadhaja]] || [[word:chashadhasha|chashadhasha]] || [[word:chashadha|chashadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chashadhafath|chashadhafath]] || [[word:chashadhafaj|chashadhafaj]] || [[word:chashadhafash|chashadhafash]] || [[word:chashadhaf|chashadhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:chashadhasha|chashadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gochashadhasha|gochashadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokichashadhasha|gokichashadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:chashadhn眉sha|chashadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gochashadhnkn眉sha|gochashadhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokichashadhn眉sha|gokichashadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chashadhsh毛sha|chashadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochashadhnksh毛sha|gochashadhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichashadhsh毛sha|gokichashadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chashadhrosha|chashadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochashadhnkrosha|gochashadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichashadhrosha|gokichashadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chashadhmusha|chashadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gochashadhnkmusha|gochashadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichashadhmusha|gokichashadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:chashadhsherasha|chashadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gochashadhnksherasha|gochashadhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokichashadhsherasha|gokichashadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:chashadhngasha|chashadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gochashadhnkngasha|gochashadhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokichashadhngasha|gokichashadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chashadhyasha|chashadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gochashadhnkyasha|gochashadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokichashadhyasha|gokichashadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:chashadhyamasha|chashadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gochashadhnkyamasha|gochashadhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokichashadhyamasha|gokichashadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:chashadhn眉sh毛sha|chashadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochashadhnkn眉sh毛sha|gochashadhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichashadhn眉sh毛sha|gokichashadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chashadhn眉rosha|chashadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochashadhnkn眉rosha|gochashadhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichashadhn眉rosha|gokichashadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chashadhn眉musha|chashadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochashadhnkn眉musha|gochashadhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichashadhn眉musha|gokichashadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:chashadhsh毛n眉sha|chashadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochashadhnksh毛n眉sha|gochashadhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichashadhsh毛n眉sha|gokichashadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chashadhsh毛rosha|chashadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochashadhnksh毛rosha|gochashadhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichashadhsh毛rosha|gokichashadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chashadhsh毛musha|chashadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochashadhnksh毛musha|gochashadhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichashadhsh毛musha|gokichashadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:chashadhron眉sha|chashadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochashadhnkron眉sha|gochashadhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichashadhron眉sha|gokichashadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:chashadhrosh毛sha|chashadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochashadhnkrosh毛sha|gochashadhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichashadhrosh毛sha|gokichashadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chashadhromusha|chashadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochashadhnkromusha|gochashadhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichashadhromusha|gokichashadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:chashadhmun眉sha|chashadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochashadhnkmun眉sha|gochashadhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichashadhmun眉sha|gokichashadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:chashadhmush毛sha|chashadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochashadhnkmush毛sha|gochashadhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichashadhmush毛sha|gokichashadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chashadhmurosha|chashadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochashadhnkmurosha|gochashadhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichashadhmurosha|gokichashadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:chashadh|chashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ch忙sh忙dh|ch忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hochashadh|hochashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoch忙sh忙dh|hoch忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohochashadh|hohochashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoch忙sh忙dh|hohoch忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉chashadh|n眉chashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ch忙sh忙dh|n眉ch忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉chashadh|n眉n眉chashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ch忙sh忙dh|n眉n眉ch忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂chashadh|n茂chashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ch忙sh忙dh|n茂ch忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂chashadh|n茂n茂chashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ch忙sh忙dh|n茂n茂ch忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luchashadh|luchashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luch忙sh忙dh|luch忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluchashadh|luluchashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluch忙sh忙dh|luluch忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lichashadh|lichashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lich忙sh忙dh|lich忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilichashadh|lilichashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilich忙sh忙dh|lilich忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kochashadh|kochashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koch忙sh忙dh|koch忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokochashadh|kokochashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoch忙sh忙dh|kokoch忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kechashadh|kechashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kech忙sh忙dh|kech忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekechashadh|kekechashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekech忙sh忙dh|kekech忙sh忙dh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
